messages.content:
According to the opening titles, which specific collection is being presented?
Options:
A. SPRING 2013 RTW
B. FALL 2013 RTW
C. WINTER 2014
D. SUMMER 2013
Please ONLY reply with the option letter. If there is truly no answer, reply with letter 'Z'. Do NOT provide any explanation. You MUST reply with a letter. Your response must be a single letter.
